pages.text: Lifesteal hearts have their own cap, set by the lifeStealHeartCap config. The default is automatic: 10 extra hearts when both mediumcore and lifesteal are on, or unlimited when only lifesteal is on.

Use /nights_mediumcore hearts living to see your current lifesteal hearts, and /nights_mediumcore hearts total to see your combined total. Admins can set exact values with /nights_mediumcore setheart.
